overview: A Jarvis-like AI voice assistant with an Iron Man-inspired HUD interface. Chat with AI using voice or text, with real-time speech recognition, text-to-speech output, and configurable AI personalities.
features: Voice chat with real-time speech recognition
Text-to-speech AI responses with customizable rate, pitch, and voice
Iron Man HUD design with cyan glow effects and animated audio visualizer
AI personality selector (Jarvis, Friday, analytical mode)
